sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53725" key="katabrekte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατα-βρεκτέον</orth>, <sense id="n53725.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must drench</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸν στόμαχον οἴνῳ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:9:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
